boringkate:

Speedrunners and runescape players have been using performance enhancing drugs called titty skittles. These “estrogens” let them game longer and makes them more comPETitive (like you know nyah). If you spot a gamer with cat ears and programming socks (or a pink and blue flag in their profile) then they’re probably tripping balls so hard that their balls don’t even work anymore. There’s no arguing with results though.
